data.title: HI-CHEW® turns 50 with limited-edition merchandise on TikTok Shop. Celebrate with plush bags, bucket hats, pins, and more.
data.description: Available now exclusively on TikTok Shop are a variety of HI-CHEW® products including plush bags, bucket hats, collectible pins, and more. This comes as the immensely fruity and intensely chewy candy brand celebrates its 50th anniversary worldwide. The limited edition items are being offered while supplies last. This announcement was made in Irvine, California, on September 18, 2025.

data.title: Mesirow Wealth Management named Barron's Top 100 RIA Firm for 5th year, expanding services to high net worth clients.
data.description: Mesirow Wealth Management has been acknowledged for its growth and expansion, catering to high net worth families and individuals across generations. They have extended their local presence beyond Chicago to regions like Southeast Florida. The firm has been listed in the Barron's Top 100 RIA Firms, which showcases the top advisory firms in the nation.

data.title: U.S. dentists eagerly await QuickSleeper5, a revolutionary digital dental anesthesia system launching after FDA clearance. Precise and painless, it sets a new standard in dentistry. QuickSleeper5 to debut at Dentsply Sirona World 2025.
data.description: Dentsply Sirona World 2025 will witness the unveiling of QuickSleeper5, a highly anticipated digital anesthesia system in the U.S. dental community. This innovative technology promises painless and precise anesthesia with immediate effects, establishing a new benchmark in dentistry. The debut will take place in Houston on September 18, 2025, during the Dentalhitec Americas event.

data.title: Financial guide "Money Moves" by Staci LaToison released, helps transition from stress to success.
data.description: Renowned investor and host of the "Money Moves" podcast, Staci LaToison, has recently revealed the release of her latest book titled "Money Moves: From Financial Stress to Financial Success." Published by Fig Factor Media, the book aims to provide valuable insights and strategies for achieving financial stability and success. The launch of this groundbreaking book marks a significant milestone in LaToison's career as an author.

data.title: New immersive art experience 'Atlas9' opened in Kansas City, inviting guests to explore film-inspired worlds.
data.description: A new immersive art destination in Kansas City by Dimensional Innovations invites visitors to delve into film-inspired realms. Named Atlas9, this premier narrative-driven experience in the Midwest aims to captivate guests with its unique and elaborate design. The attraction is set to open on September 18, 2025, in Kansas City, Kansas. Offering a variety of interactive and visually stunning environments, Atlas9 promises to provide a one-of-a-kind experience for visitors to explore.

data.title: San Diego salon Roxo named one of L'Oreal Professional's top 100 in US, the only one in SD. - Sep. 18, 2025.
data.description: In a recent announcement by Roxo founder and owner Marci Lizerbram, it was revealed that the San Diego hair salon, Roxo Salon & Boutique, has secured a distinguished spot on the coveted Top 100 Salon list by renowned beauty brand L'Oreal Professional. This accolade makes Roxo Salon & Boutique the sole representative from San Diego to achieve this recognition. The selection highlights the salon's exceptional services and standards in the beauty industry. Congratulations to Roxo Salon & Boutique for this prestigious achievement.

data.title: Inventor from Conroe, Texas develops new sterile dressing option for infants after 25 years of nursing, patent titled HOF-726.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 18, 2025, a registered nurse with 25 years of experience in the neonatal intensive care unit hailing from Conroe, Texas, expressed the need for an enhanced sterile dressing option for premature infants. This innovation was sparked by recognizing a gap in current practices and aiming to address it. The inventor's background underscores the credibility of the solution and highlights the importance of specialized care for vulnerable populations. This development signifies a step towards improving healthcare protocols for delicate newborns, showcasing the potential for advancements in critical medical settings.

data.title: dYdX Foundation and 21Shares showcase protocol performance and roadmap in analyst call, focusing on institutional adoption.
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland on September 18, 2025, the dYdX Foundation conducted its first analyst call in collaboration with 21Shares. The discussion focused on the protocol's strong performance, increasing institutional uptake, and plans for the future. The Foundation revealed various forthcoming projects and initiatives during the call.

data.title: Surge Copper closed private placement with ARM, selling 25,781,715 shares at $0.175 each, raising approx C$4.5 million. ARM now owns 19.9% of Surge.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 18, 2025, Surge Copper Corp. disclosed the completion of its strategic private placement with African Rainbow Minerals Limited. Under this agreement, ARM acquired 25,781,715 common shares at $0.175 per share, amounting to around C$4.5 million. This transaction enhances ARM’s stake in Surge to 19.9% of the company. Surge Copper Corp. is listed as TSXV: SURG, OTCQB: SRGXF, and on the Frankfurt exchange as G6D2.

data.title: BC municipalities saw a $3.6B spike in spending; 78% spent more than population growth from 2013 to 2023, driving up property taxes.
data.description: A report by the Business Council of British Columbia reveals that municipal operating spending in B.C. has surged over the past decade, with 78% of municipalities increasing spending faster than population growth between 2013 and 2023. This led to $3.6 billion in excess spending, resulting in a 94% increase in property taxes on owner-occupied homes from January 2010 to July 2025, exceeding CPI inflation rates. Municipalities spent $834 per capita more than warranted by population growth and inflation. The report highlights the impact of this runaway spending on households and businesses, driving up property taxes and exacerbating affordability issues.

data.title: Bitcoin mimics May breakout pattern, anticipated to hit $118K; analysts caution on challenging journey to price discovery.
data.description: Bitcoin is mirroring the actions that drove its most recent record highs, with the cryptocurrency showing signs of following a similar trajectory. However, experts caution that the journey towards establishing new price highs may be challenging. The digital currency has demonstrated patterns reminiscent of its previous peaks, suggesting a potential upward movement. Despite these promising indicators, analysts emphasize that Bitcoin's path to reaching new all-time highs will likely be turbulent and require careful monitoring. Investors are advised to proceed with caution and stay informed about market developments as the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve.
